diagrams.title: 2×2 Matrix Inverse Formula
diagrams.description: Visual representation of how to find inverse of 2×2 matrix
diagrams.purpose: Quick reference for 2×2 matrix inverse calculation

diagrams.title: Gauss-Jordan Method Flowchart
diagrams.description: Step-by-step process for finding inverse using Gauss-Jordan elimination
elements: Check if left side becomes I
If yes: right side is A⁻¹
If no: matrix is singular (no inverse)
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the systematic procedure for matrix inversion

diagrams.title: Matrix Invertibility Decision Tree
diagrams.description: Flowchart showing conditions for matrix to be invertible
elements: Is matrix square? → If no, no standard inverse
Is rank = n? → If yes, invertible
diagrams.purpose: Visual guide to check if matrix has inverse
